mapper.select: SELECT B.*, M."MEMBER_NAME", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_FILE" BF WHERE BF."BOARD_NUM" = B."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "FILE_COUNT" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" B LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON B."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM" WHERE B."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum} ORDER BY B."BOARD_NUM" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}

SELECT CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID" WHERE CB."BOARD_NUM" = #{boardNum}

SELECT
CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter",
M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName",
CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory",
CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_FILE" BF WHERE BF."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "fileCount",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" BC WHERE BC."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "commentCount"
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID"
WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}
ORDER BY CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC
LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}
SELECT * FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" WHERE "CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum} ORDER BY "BOARD_NUM" DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "TB_CLUB_BOARD" ( "BOARD_TITLE", "BOARD_CONTENTS", "BOARD_WRITER", "BOARD_CATEGORY", "CLUB_NUM", "CREATE_DATE" ) VALUES ( #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, #{boardWriter}, #{boardCategory}, #{clubNum}, NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select: SELECT CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID" WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum} AND CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" = '공지' ORDER BY CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT M."MEMBER_NUM"
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID"
WHERE CB."BOARD_NUM" = #{boardNum}

SELECT B."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", B."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", B."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", B."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", B."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", B."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", B."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", C."CLUB_NAME" AS "clubName" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" B INNER JOIN "TB_CLUB" C ON B."CLUB_NUM" = C."CLUB_NUM" WHERE B."BOARD_WRITER" = #{memberId} ORDER BY B."BOARD_NUM" DESC
